query:
You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.41 (commit: 1281a8b6).

## Issue to Resolve

Improve wording of no connection message
We use the strings "No network available" (title) and "There is no network available" (message) together in several places when we detect there's no network connection. As mentioned [here](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/pull/21275#discussion_r1790413203), this is redundant and unhelpful. We should use better wording, or simply use only the title string and no message.

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Thanks for reporting! 👍 <!-- generated_by_dangermattic -->

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/mediapicker/loader/GifMediaDataSource.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/mediapicker/loader/MediaLibraryDataSource.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/mediapicker/loader/StockMediaDataSource.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/selfhostedusers/SelfHostedUserComposables.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/selfhostedusers/SelfHostedUsersActivity.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/selfhostedusers/SelfHostedUsersScreen.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/selfhostedusers/SelfHostedUsersViewModel.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/res/layout/actionable_empty_view.xml`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.thinking:
**Planning string resource updates**

I’m sorting out how to improve the “no network” message by updating string resources for better wording, especially making the message less redundant with the title. I’ll focus on updating base and English variants in relevant XML files, considering how these strings show up in various UI components like toasts and actionable empty views. I want to confirm all places these strings appear before editing to ensure consistency across the app.

content.text:
Summary:
- Updated the `no_network_message` string in the main resources file and all English regional variants to say “Check your internet connection and try again.” so it complements the “No network available” title instead of duplicating it.
- Mirrored the same wording change in `fastlane/resources/values/strings.xml` to keep release resources consistent.

Testing:
- Not run (string resource change only).
